mission: Build, create, connect — decentralized family mesh. This file is the machine-routable spine for p31ca.org; human narrative stays in root CLAUDE.md, P31 COGNITIVE PASSPORT — v5.md, and docs/. **Corporate + open print suite (letterhead, memos, watermarks) lives in andromeda/docs/corporate; public surface: /open-doc-suite.html. Version namespaces: P31 home docs/CANONICAL-NUMBERING.md; values: P31 home p31-constants.json.

phosphorus31.label: Public org / programs (phosphorus31.org)
phosphorus31.repoPath: separate tree — not governed by this file

andromedaCorporate.label: P31 Open Doc Suite + corporate one-pager (Andromeda repo, not a separate deploy)

homeVertical.label: P31 home — Soup, passport authoring, wcd33

canonicalDome.label: Sovereign Cockpit Dome (K₄ interactive)
canonicalDome.note: Primary CTA from hub home. Not the same product as observatory.

observatory.label: OBSERVATORY — geodesic panel inspector
observatory.note: Hub registry appUrl must stay observatory.html.

k4market.label: K4 MARKET — tetrahedral price geometry (Three.js r160)
k4market.note: Main viz surface. Symbol search and Larmor ring live in tomography.html.

tomography.label: K4 TOMOGRAPHY — symbol-seeded depth view (Three.js r183)
tomography.note: Depth companion to k4market.html. Linked from k4market nav.

planetaryOnboard.label: Planetary Onboarding — five-phase neuro-inclusive entry flow
planetaryOnboard.note: No Three.js. Phase 5 passkey stub — awaits Cloudflare Worker backend.

connect.label: The Mesh — K₄ cage + product graph (Three.js r160)
connect.note: Envision / Build / Connect navigator. Family cage + product satellites. Click nodes to open products.

delta.label: Wye→Delta — public narrative page explaining mesh resilience and onboarding
delta.note: No Three.js. Uses Tailwind CDN. Entry-point for external visitors — links to /planetary-onboard.html and /connect.html.

auth.label: Authenticate — passkey verification page for returning mesh members
auth.note: No Three.js. Calls /api/passkey/auth-begin + auth-finish. Falls back gracefully when Worker not deployed. Short URL: /auth via _redirects.

latticeOracle.label: Lattice Oracle — toy crystallomancy (CSPRNG, client-only)
latticeOracle.note: No network. Short URL /oracle via _redirects. Not medical, legal, or financial advice.

creatorEconomy.label: Creator Economy Contract — p31.creatorEconomy/1.0.0
creatorEconomy.note: CI-verified fee/split disclosure. Source: ground-truth/creator-economy.json. Verifier: scripts/verify-creator-economy.mjs. Runs in prebuild. Public endpoint: /creator-economy.json (CORS *). Version 1.0.0 constraints: platform fee = 0, creator share = 1.0, room access free.

geodesic.label: GEODESIC — 3D structure builder + K₄ live room
geodesic.note: Three.js r160. Static mode: 5-track progressive coach (BONDING-style tutor + tool unlocks, localStorage geodesic:progress:v1; skip=full unlock). ?room=<id> bypasses coach and enables K4 live: wss to GeodesicRoom DO (e.g. geodesic-room.trimtab-signal.workers.dev) for authoritative vertices (v0–v3) plus Phase-1 shared builder shapes (tet/oct/ico/cube) persisted in the DO, Maxwell rigidity summary on /state and in hello, 50-shape cap. Full spec: workspace docs/GEODESIC-CAMPAIGN.md when P31 home tree is present.

openDocSuite.label: P31 Open Doc Suite (git-native office pack + Forge bridge)
openDocSuite.note: Source tree: andromeda/docs/corporate. .docx via 04_SOFTWARE/p31-forge. Short path: /doc-suite (redirect).
